name: claude-pager
description: Native desktop notifications when Claude Code needs your attention

idle_enabled.title: Idle notifications
idle_enabled.description: Enable notifications when Claude waits for input (on/off)

permission_enabled.title: Permission notifications
permission_enabled.description: Enable notifications when Claude needs permission (on/off)

completion_enabled.title: Completion notifications
completion_enabled.description: Enable notifications when a task completes (on/off)

idle_sound.title: Idle sound preset
idle_sound.description: Sound for idle events: default, ping, glass, pop, hero, none

permission_sound.title: Permission sound preset
permission_sound.description: Sound for permission events: default, ping, glass, pop, hero, none

completion_sound.title: Completion sound preset
completion_sound.description: Sound for completion events: default, ping, glass, pop, hero, none
